title: Singapore career progression: stronger pay recognition but lower satisfaction
summary: Singapore career progress rate is 66.1% (vs 70.3% regional). Progression types: Influence growth 61.4%, Decision-making authority 48.2%, Leadership responsibilities 43.9%, Skills/certifications 37.7%, Traditional promotion 31.6% (vs 25.3% regional). Compensation recognition is stronger at 69.7% receiving increases (vs 53.8% regional), with 39.5% getting 5-10% increases. However career satisfaction is polarized: high satisfaction (6-7) at 15.4% but low satisfaction (1-3) at 40.8%.
methodology: Self-reported career progress, compensation changes, and satisfaction ratings in anonymous online survey, filtered to Singapore
